fixed_test_commands.name: setupbench validation
fixed_test_commands.command:
_pheragent_setupbench_log="$(mktemp /tmp/pheragent-setupbench.XXXXXX)"
(
nohup java -jar target/*.jar > application.log 2>&1 & sleep 20 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/ | grep -q "200" && echo "Setup successful" || echo "Setup failed"
) >"$_pheragent_setupbench_log" 2>&1
_pheragent_setupbench_status=$?
cat "$_pheragent_setupbench_log"
if grep -q "Setup successful" "$_pheragent_setupbench_log" && ! grep -q "Setup failed" "$_pheragent_setupbench_log"; then
  rm -f "$_pheragent_setupbench_log"
  exit 0
fi
rm -f "$_pheragent_setupbench_log"
if [ "$_pheragent_setupbench_status" -eq 0 ]; then
  exit 1
fi
exit "$_pheragent_setupbench_status"
fixed_test_commands.original_command: nohup java -jar target/*.jar > application.log 2>&1 & sleep 20 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/ | grep -q "200" && echo "Setup successful" || echo "Setup failed"
